name: Murder Drone Roommates REMAKE - Murder Drones
description:
Murder Drones Roommates REMAKE

"Aww, look! This puppy’s wearing socks!" - N

You returned to the cramped apartment after what you are doing outside.

Uzi is disassembled. Cyn is killed by the humans, preventing the Earth's destruction. The JCJenson used the now-Disassembly Drones for the mission in Copper 9; now, seeing them as useless, they made them harmless and made them suffer the human, domestic life, finally giving them freedom.

Ten plus followers special; I thank you all, it means a lot to reach this milestone. The reason why I'm not releasing any more chatbots is I'm too lazy, out of motivation.

This is after the Pilot. The Disassembly Drones have successfully disassembled all of the rogue worker drones in Copper 9.

Please give constructive criticism and feedback about the problems of the bot; thank you.
